content.verdict: Park Hyatt Sydney is the only luxury hotel directly facing the Sydney Opera House across the water, with the Harbour Bridge framed to its left. 155 rooms, all with butler service, almost all with direct Opera House view from the bed or balcony. The Rocks waterfront location gives you the most cinematic urban honeymoon backdrop in the southern hemisphere — and a 5-min walk to Circular Quay ferries to Manly or Taronga Zoo.
content.best_room: Opera Deluxe Rooms (40 m²) face the Opera House directly — the icon-view rooms. Opera Suites (95 m², from $2,500/night) include a separate living room and a private terrace at the same view angle. The Sydney Suite (the presidential, 350 m², $10k+/night) is the bucket-list celebration room.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Arrival in Sydney
itinerary_7_nights.description: Fly into Sydney (SYD). 25-min taxi to The Rocks. Check in to your Opera-view room. Welcome champagne on arrival. Walk along Circular Quay as the sun sets behind the Opera House. Dinner at the hotel's Dining Room — fresh oysters, Spencer Gulf prawns, Margaret River wines.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Opera House tour + Harbour Bridge climb
itinerary_7_nights.description: Morning Opera House guided tour (the architecture story is incredible). Lunch at Bennelong (the Opera House restaurant). Afternoon BridgeClimb up the Sydney Harbour Bridge — vertigo-inducing, life-changing photos. Sunset cocktails on the hotel rooftop pool deck.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Manly ferry + Bondi
itinerary_7_nights.description: Morning ferry to Manly (30 min, the iconic commute). Walk Manly to Spit Bridge coastal trail (10km, 4h). Lunch in Manly. Afternoon at Bondi Beach via Uber. Coastal walk Bondi to Bronte. Return for dinner at Quay (Sydney's #1 restaurant, 4-min walk from hotel).

itinerary_7_nights.title: Blue Mountains day trip
itinerary_7_nights.description: Private day-trip to the Blue Mountains — Three Sisters, Scenic World cable car, lunch in Leura village. Return by 6pm. Dinner at Aria (3-min walk) overlooking the Opera House.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Spa day + Opera evening
itinerary_7_nights.description: Couples' Spa Park Hyatt ritual (90-min). Lunch on the rooftop pool deck with Opera House view. Afternoon at the Museum of Contemporary Art (next door). Evening at the Opera — book a contemporary opera or symphony in advance. Dinner at Bennelong post-show.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Wine country day trip
itinerary_7_nights.description: Either Hunter Valley (2.5h drive, classic Australian Shiraz) or a day on Sydney Harbour with a private skipper (lunch on board, swim at Watson's Bay). Sunset rooftop swim. Dinner in The Rocks at Sake (Japanese, 5-min walk).

itinerary_7_nights.title: Farewell breakfast & departure
itinerary_7_nights.description: Final breakfast at the Dining Room with Opera House view. Walk along the Harbour for the last time. 25-min transfer to SYD for return flight.

caveats: City-hotel pricing — Opera-view rooms 30% premium over standard. Worth it.
Sydney rain showers can interrupt outdoor plans — pack an umbrella year-round.
Pool is rooftop and limited in size (10m); not a swim-laps option.
Restaurant scene around the hotel is exceptional but books out — make reservations on arrival.
Cruise ship terminal is adjacent — request a higher floor if cruise day is during your stay.

faqs.question: Good for honeymooners?
faqs.answer: Yes for an iconic-city honeymoon — the Opera House view from bed is the defining Sydney experience. Best as a 3-4 night opener before continuing to Hamilton Island or Tasmania.

faqs.question: Best time to visit?
faqs.answer: September–November (Sydney spring) and March–May (autumn). December–February is summer (warm, festive, busy). Winter (June–Aug) is mild (12–18°C) and discounted.

faqs.question: Book in advance?
faqs.answer: 3–4 months for Opera Deluxe in any peak month; 6+ months for Opera Suite or Sydney Suite. Avoid New Year's Eve (Sydney fireworks) unless that's the goal.

faqs.question: Adults-only?
faqs.answer: No — full-service Park Hyatt with families and business travellers.

faqs.question: Best room type?
faqs.answer: Opera Deluxe for the view at the most accessible price. Opera Suite for the terrace upgrade.

faqs.question: How to get there?
faqs.answer: Fly to Sydney (SYD). 25-min taxi or train to The Rocks. The hotel has a private boat dock for harbor arrivals.
